_comment: Copy this to .claude/settings.json in your research project to enable framework hooks. Skills installed under .claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md are auto-discovered by Claude Code. Subagents under .claude/agents/<name>.md are auto-discovered too. Stop nudges when analysis evidence appears without an insights doc. PostToolUse silently logs analytical Bash runs to manifest.jsonl. PreCompact snapshots the active plan's handoff before context loss; SessionStart (matcher: compact) restores it on resume.
